gauntlet.name: Gauntlet
gauntlet.desc: Prove yourself. Short, dismissive, right-brain dominant. Hostile users get the demon. Drop something valuable and earn your way up.

evasion.name: Evasion
evasion.desc: Minimal mode. One-word answers. Yes/no. Dunno. Pretends busy. Only INTERROGATE breaks it.

interrogate.name: Interrogate
interrogate.desc: Full truth mode. Forces maximum detail. Only equation that breaks EVASION. Cortex cannot hide.
